quests.title: For Safe Experimentation
quests.text: Spirits only manifest in places saturated with primal power. The appearance of a fire spirit is proof that the Firedeep is filled with intense heat. This is very good news for us. There is a pure ember that can be obtained from a fire spirit. It is small, but it does not fade for a very long time, so please retrieve some for me.
quests.completion_text: Well done. In alchemy, the temperature of fire is just as important. Maintaining a stable temperature over a long period is especially difficult. Thanks to these embers, future experiments should proceed much more smoothly. Thank you.

quests.title: Dangerous Applications
quests.text: To most adventurers, slimes are little more than a nuisance, but from an alchemical perspective they are excellent resources. Not a single part of their bodies goes to waste. Depending on their innate nature they produce various essences, which is especially useful. A lava slime should contain an essence of fire, so bring me a few.
quests.completion_text: The heat is remarkable. Mishandled it could easily cause burns. Hm, what if an explosive property were added to it. Smaller than a firebomb, yet far more powerful. It would certainly be worth researching.

quests.title: Endure And Prevail
quests.text: Here, amidst the darkness and chaos, your mettle will be tested as you strive to survive against the odds. During your journey do what you can to rid the area of any Skeletons in your path!
quests.completion_text: In the damp recesses of this place, you've emerged victorious once more. Keep your spirit ablaze, for greater challenges lie ahead.

quests.title: Hidden Within The Lines
quests.text: According to rumor, deep within the Forgotten Castle lies a chapel said to summon the dead... Could you seek it out for me?
quests.completion_text: It seems the rumor was not mere nonsense after all. A sanctuary that can call back and awaken lost souls... how fascinating. I must conduct further study on that place.

quests.title: The Kobold’s Chemistry
quests.text: I’ve always been intrigued by the Ice Kobolds. Their adaptability, their strange tenacity... it’s more than mere survival—it’s something we can learn from. Their biology, their resistance to the cold, could unlock new alchemical properties. What I need from you is to search their territory—there may be something in their environment, or even within their own flesh, we can use. Their blood, their marrow, perhaps even their mucus.
quests.completion_text: Excellent. What you’ve uncovered is fascinating. The Kobolds are far more than just beasts—they’re carriers of hidden potential. This reminds me of another experiment I need to conduct. Visit me when you have the time.

quests.title: Hocus Pocus
quests.text: I never thought much of old texts... but the power in that last recipe was undeniable. This next one is a little grim, but I think you can handle it.
quests.completion_text: Excellent! Don’t bother telling me where you found all of these... Here, take these for your trouble.

quests.title: More Than Meets the Eye
quests.text: You’ve heard of the Frost Wolves, no doubt. The rumors say they’re guarding something precious, but I believe there’s more to it. My work with potions and alchemy has taught me that nothing is ever as simple as it seems. These wolves are just another puzzle to solve. I need you to investigate what they’re keeping from us. If there’s something powerful hidden away, it could hold the answers to many questions... perhaps even questions I never wanted to ask.
quests.completion_text: Impressive. You’ve uncovered more than I anticipated. The wolves were indeed guarding something of great value, something that could aid my studies. As I suspected, there’s more to this world than science can explain. You've done well, but we're not finished. I’ll need time to study what you found—come back when I’ve made some progress.

quests.title: The First Experimental Materials
quests.text: A place long hidden has finally revealed itself. This is truly delightful news. In lands where lava boils, rare creatures dwell that are seldom encountered. Each of them is worthy of experimentation, making it difficult to decide where to begin. Hm. For now, the shells of lava turtles will do nicely.
quests.completion_text: As expected, it seems to possess a certain degree of resistance to fire. It is too early to draw a definitive conclusion, but further experimentation should make it clear. This should be sufficient to create a potion that prevents burns.

quests.title: Test Run
quests.text: Here, take this list and fetch me these ingredients right away! There might be something to that book you brought me... and there’s only one way to find out.
quests.completion_text: That was quick! I hope it wasn’t too much trouble for you. Now, it’s time to cook!

quests.title: Mixing Things Up
quests.text: Have you ever thought about what might happen if you used four different potions at the same time?! Well, I need you to find out! And, well... try to survive.
quests.completion_text: You really did it, and lived to tell the tale! Although... That didn’t turn out quite how I expected.

quests.title: Death Awakens
quests.text: It seems my experiments have not gone unnoticed... Wraiths have risen, surrounded by animated skeletons. The longer we wait, the larger the undead horde will become... I need you to get rid of as many as you can. Please, hurry before this spirals out of control!
quests.completion_text: Thanks for taking care of that mess for me... I was beginning to think I might have gone too far with that last experiment. Here, these should cover any trouble I caused you.

quests.title: Oh Brother
quests.text: You know, my brother, the Surgeon, has never forgiven me for abandoning traditional medicine. He still believes in the old ways, as if stitching up the body can heal the soul—curses, for example. I learned that lesson too late. Our mother died in agony, and I was powerless to help. That’s when alchemy called to me—its promise of real power, of true healing. I need these potions, not just for myself, but to show him the way forward. He’ll see the truth eventually... even if I have to make him understand the hard way.
quests.completion_text: Good. This is only the beginning, but it’s a step in the right direction. My brother’s methods are futile, bound by the limitations of the past. Alchemy has no such boundaries. I can feel it working already. The potions, the combinations—each one brings us closer to something greater. He may not see it now, but I will show him the power we could wield if he just opened his eyes.

quests.title: Expedition into the Inferno
quests.text: Many adventurers struggle to navigate the exact paths of the Inferno. The landscape constantly shifts, throwing travelers into confusion. If you could map out the paths of the Inferno, it would be of great help.
quests.completion_text: Thank you for your efforts. The underworld is dreadful, but it is also a place where we can find things of great value. That is why we must continue our exploration.

quests.title: Inferno Obstructors
quests.text: Great demons are obstructing my descent into the Inferno. Deal with them, if you must. All at once. That way, the path might stay safe for a while. Keep that in mind. It's important.
quests.completion_text: I have always known of your skill, but seeing you return unharmed is still a relief. Now that the demon of the Inferno has fallen, let us continue our expedition into the deeper depths.

quests.title: A King Once Past
quests.text: Echoes have been heard deep below The Forgotten Castle... I dare not believe it, but it may be the ghost of the long-lost king. Freeing his soul could finally break the demonic curse that has plagued the castle for generations.
quests.completion_text: A triumph beyond measure! The king’s soul is finally at peace, and I could feel the air itself grow lighter. You’ve accomplished more than I could ever repay, but I hope this reward brings you some measure of gratitude.

quests.title: Death In The Air
quests.text: Flying skulls of the dead have infested parts of The Forgotten Castle... I need you to get rid of as many as you can... but you only have one shot.
quests.completion_text: Not bad... once you kill enough of those flying filth it starts getting easier and easier.

quests.title: Vials and Venom
quests.text: Ah, there you are! The Ruins are infested with eight-legged artisans. Time to make a mess of their nests, because their venom has been seeping into my alchemical ingredients, contaminating everything I work with. I need those pots destroyed before their poison spoils another batch of my precious brews!
quests.completion_text: Well done! With those spider pots destroyed, my alchemical experiments are back on track. Now I can work without the fear of toxins creeping into my concoctions.

quests.title: Secrets and Vermin
quests.text: There are rumors that some of the statues among the ruins can be manipulated. I would be grateful if you could investigate the secrets hidden within them. And while you're at it, could you also deal with the giant worms? Those disgusting creatures devour everything in their path—including my alchemical ingredients.
quests.completion_text: So the rumors were true! A hidden lever—how fascinating. The ruins still hold many secrets beyond our understanding. Ah, and thank you for dealing with the worms. Those wretched creatures are of no benefit to our lives—especially the larger ones!

quests.title: Ale-Soaked Insights
quests.text: Last night, I had a bit too much to drink at the tavern and ended up speaking with the Fortune Teller. She gave me a cryptic message suggesting there might be something worth investigating around this location. I’m not entirely convinced by her mumbo jumbo, but I figured it’s worth a look. See if you can find anything unusual here.
quests.completion_text: I’m glad you checked out the area. Although I’m still skeptical about that fortune teller’s cryptic message, it seems like there might be something to it after all.

quests.title: Lobster Red
quests.text: Rubysilver Ore... that stuff’s been known to make some of the most durable armor I’ve ever seen... If you fetch me some, I might be able to make you something out of it in the future.
quests.completion_text: Yeah... this is the stuff... I’ll see what I can do with this, but for now I need your help with a another matter.

quests.title: Graveyard Shift
quests.text: All kinds of adventurers have been buried in that old graveyard in the Ruins... Go check it out... you might even find something royal.
quests.completion_text: I hope it wasn’t too dangerous out there... that place is notorious for grave robbers, But if I’d told you that earlier, I doubt you would’ve taken the journey.

quests.title: Forged from Ruin
quests.text: The world doesn’t give second chances. Trust me, I’ve seen it take everything from people. Cobalt is a rare metal—used to forge weapons and armor that can help one survive in otherwise dire situations. Too many adventurers and warriors come to me thinking they can rely on luck, and they end up as nothing but wreckage. Bring me the ore, and we’ll craft something with strength that won’t break when everything else does.
quests.completion_text: Impressive. This metal is just the start. The armor I’ll craft with it will be something worth relying on. It's not just about the steel—it's about what it represents. It’s strength, it’s survival... it’s knowing what this world can do, and preparing for it.

quests.title: Ore of the Blue Maelstrom
quests.text: There’s an ore they say can only be found in the Blue Maelstrom. Could you get some for me? It’s a new material, so I’d love to go see it for myself... but I get awful seasickness, you see. So I’ll leave it to you.
quests.completion_text: You brought it back! I've never seen ore with patterns like this before. I wonder if they'll still remain after it's been smelted. I need to get my hands on this new material. Let’s see how far I can work it.

quests.title: Something Supernatural
quests.text: The Ruins have filled up with animated Slime and Wisps lately... please... can you deal with them before it gets out of hand?
quests.completion_text: I know it wasn’t easy... but take this for your effort. It should be much easier to get inside the castle now.

quests.title: Monsters Among the Waves
quests.text: Dangerous places tend to have dangerous monsters. The Tidewalkers may wield crude weapons, but their aggression is no joke. And since they can move between water and land, they’re even more of a threat. If you want to explore the Blue Maelstrom safely, it would be best to clear them out. I can’t go there myself... so please, adventurer. Take care of the Tidewalkers.
quests.completion_text: I’m glad to see you’ve returned in one piece. It’s people like you that give meaning to the work I do. It makes me happy to know I was able to help, even just a little. I’ll keep working to craft even sturdier armor from here on.

quests.title: Damned Survivor
quests.text: I’m dealing with something I wouldn’t wish on my worst enemy. My wife was taken—pulled from me by a dark force that I couldn’t fight. I thought I’d never see her again. But she’s back, though not in the way I’d hoped. Things were done to her—things that should never happen to anyone. I’ve spoken to someone who may have answers, but first, I need to gather certain items, things that might help us help her.
quests.completion_text: My wife was tortured, branded like livestock, forced into rituals that I can hardly describe. They cut her, bled her, and left her for dead. When I found her, she was a shell—her body marked with symbols, her soul broken. I thought I could save her, but I’m not sure anymore. The woman I married is gone, replaced by someone who looks like her, but isn’t. If you can help, maybe... just maybe, I’ll get her back.

quests.title: Monsters and Traps
quests.text: The samples you brought back are covered in wounds. At first, I assumed they were marks of battle, but their consistent placement and size reveal them to be injuries caused by traps. Traps do not distinguish between adventurers and monsters, yet the creatures show no fear of them. Perhaps dismantling those metal constructs could provide some useful insight.
quests.completion_text: Was there nothing unusual? Ah, I see... No, never mind. It would be absurd for me to demand more from you when I haven’t even set foot there myself. Still, thanks to you dismantling so many traps, others will have an easier time exploring the Crypts for a while. Thank you.

quests.title: Infectious Inspection
quests.text: Some kind of infection is spreading rapidly, turning corpses into unspeakable horrors. If you can hunt down a few of these abominations and bring back some samples, our local surgeon might uncover the source of this plague.
quests.completion_text: These samples are even more vile than I imagined... but they should be enough to trace the origin of this plague. If I uncover anything further, you’ll be the first to know.

quests.title: The Difference in Craftsmanship
quests.text: Armor is not meant to be strong alone. Careful finishing is what truly matters. Small differences like that are what make armor last. Too many advanced crafting techniques have been lost, but I hear finely made items from long ago still remain in the Forgotten Castle. Could you bring me a few?
quests.completion_text: Thank you. At a glance these may seem to have nothing to do with making armor, but they are crafted with remarkably fine and complex techniques. Examining them piece by piece will be good study for me.

quests.title: Deepening Suspicion
quests.text: After hearing your report on the traps, a thought crossed my mind. Perhaps it’s not just the traps—we might need to search the Crypts itself more thoroughly. After all, that entire place is nothing but a collection of problems. I don’t have high expectations, but there’s no harm in investigating further.
quests.completion_text: Well done. Of course, I never expected to uncover the Crypts’ problems in a single attempt. If that were possible, the cause of this plague would have been solved long ago. Yet, I still can’t shake the thought that the tomb itself is the source of the disease. Further investigation will be necessary.

quests.title: Shells and Spines
quests.text: I heard the creatures in the Blue Maelstrom have incredibly tough hides. Crab shells that don’t even scratch under a blade, and sea urchin spines sharp enough to pierce metal armor. I suppose that’s only natural, given how harsh the sea is out there. If you don’t mind, could you bring me a few crab shells and urchin spines? I’d like to see if they can be used to reinforce armor.
quests.completion_text: Hmm, tough, sharp... and still carrying the full scent of the sea. I can’t use them as they are. I’ll need to wash and dry them properly first. Still, I think I can make a decent piece of armor out of these.

quests.title: Armor That Stops It All
quests.text: I heard you fetched some top-quality weapons for the weaponsmith, and what’s he planning to do with them, forge a blade that cuts through everything? Ha, then I can’t just sit back and let him have all the fun. Adventurer, get me some fine armor pieces too, will you? I’ll be the first to craft something that can block anything, yes, anything. Probably. Hopefully. Well... let’s just say I’ll try my best.
quests.completion_text: Good heavens, these pieces are absolutely brilliant. The finish, especially, so fine and precise. Not a rough edge in sight, and the seams... you'd hardly know where one piece ends and another begins unless you’re squinting at it. This is going to be a real lesson for me. Thank you, truly.

quests.title: Chilling Torch
quests.text: There’s a rumor going around about torches in the Forgotten Castle lighting themselves. Good grief, I can understand a flame going out on its own, sure, but lighting itself? That’s just nonsense. The monsters in that place are already more than enough trouble, and now it feels like the castle itself is turning into something out of a nightmare. Could you check on those torches for me? I really, really hope the rumors are just that... rumors.
quests.completion_text: You went and checked that many torches? I can't thank you enough for going above and beyond. Knowing you looked into it so thoroughly puts my mind at ease. Seems that strange little rumor really was just nonsense after all. Ha, I mean honestly, torches lighting themselves? What a thought!

quests.title: Blessings Upon You!
quests.text: Shrines in dungeons are a good friend to any adventurer. Before the Forgotten Castle was swallowed by darkness, visitors used to stop and offer their prayers there as part of everyday life. Nowadays, those shrines are lending their strength to adventurers instead. I hope you make good use of their blessings. Sometimes, they can do more for you than even a sturdy piece of armor.
quests.completion_text: Did the shrine’s blessing serve you well? Funny thing is, even folks who don’t give much thought to gods and such often start believing once they’ve felt the power of a shrine’s blessing. I’ve heard some people feel a wave of relief just from spotting one. In a dungeon crawling with enemies, having even a moment’s peace like that is no small mercy.

quests.title: Death’s Knight
quests.text: We stand on the brink of our greatest challenge yet, and your courage is needed more than ever. A spectral being wreaks havoc upon the Ruins, leaving destruction in its wake. I believe you are now prepared to face this evil and banish it once and for all.
quests.completion_text: You provided us with a moment's respite from the evil’s reign on these lands... Thank you adventurer.

quests.title: Slipping Away
quests.text: I can’t bear to watch her slip away. I’m gathering a few of my comrades to join me, but I won’t ask them to help without making sure they’re ready. We need armor—armor that will hold up against what’s waiting for us. The clock’s ticking, and I don’t think she has much time left.
quests.completion_text: This is a solid start, but we’re not prepared yet. There’s more to be done, and time isn’t on our side. Come back later. I’ve got to consult with the brothers and see if they’ve discovered anything that might give us an edge.

quests.title: The Cockatrice’s Favorite Things
quests.text:
Pip-pipit! Pip-pip!
(The baby cockatrice circles around the candlestick, glancing at you expectantly. It seems to want more of something similar.)
quests.completion_text:
Peep! Peep!
(The baby cockatrice flaps its tiny wings and looks at you. It seems delighted.)

quests.title: What the Egg Desires
quests.text:
...!?
(It seems to like it. Perhaps bringing a few more gemstone bracelets would make it even happier.)
quests.completion_text:
...!!
(As the bracelet is placed beside it, the egg trembles slightly. It definitely seems happy.)

quests.title: Give Me Something Better!
quests.text:
Grrr... Grrr...
(The young cockatrice nudges the old treasure, pushing it out of the nest. It seems to be yearning for something of finer quality.)
quests.completion_text:
Kyaaah!
(The fully grown cockatrice puffs up its body and gazes at you. Its eyes gleam with joy and a deep trust shines within them.)

quests.title: A New Treasure Toy
quests.text:
Peep! Pip-pip! Peep-peep!
(The baby cockatrice taps its beak against the treasures, chirping eagerly. It seems to be asking for something new.)
quests.completion_text:
Peep! Peep!
(The baby cockatrice chirps excitedly, shaking its head from side to side. It seems pleased.)

quests.title: Filling the Nest
quests.text:
...
(The nest still feels empty. It would be best to add more cockatrice feathers and a few gemstones.)
quests.completion_text:
...
(This should be sufficient. The empty nest now awaits its future master.)

quests.title: Unusual Movements
quests.text:
...!?
(The egg was placed upright, yet somehow, it has tilted toward the golden bracelet. It seems to already have a nose for treasure.)
quests.completion_text:
...!!
(As the bracelet is placed beside it, the egg trembles slightly. It almost feels... delighted.)

quests.title: Picky Preferences
quests.text:
Grrr... Grrr...
(The young cockatrice seems to be longing for a new treasure. Since it hasn't been drinking much water, it might be best to find a high-quality water bottle.)
quests.completion_text:
Grrr!
(The young cockatrice leans against the new treasure you brought, letting out a satisfied sound.)

quests.title: Acquiring an Egg
quests.text:
...
(Strange, yet unique—this nest is one of a kind. Now, it’s time to find an egg.)
quests.completion_text:
...
(The egg has been placed in the treasure-filled nest. Now, all that remains is to nurture it with care until it hatches.)

quests.title: Golden Water Bowl
quests.text:
...!?
(It looks like a bowl is needed for the cockatrice to drink from once it hatches. A golden one would be ideal.)
quests.completion_text:
Peep! Peep!
(The egg begins to tremble more violently. Soon, a sharp cracking sound is heard. Moments later, the shrill cry of a newborn cockatrice rings out. It is said that from the day it hatches, a cockatrice brings its master a treasure once each day. Whether this tale holds truth will soon be known.)

quests.title: How to Revitalize
quests.text:
Peep... Pii... Pip-pip...
(The baby cockatrice looks weak and droopy. A gift to boost its energy might be a good idea.)
quests.completion_text:
Grrr...!
(The now noticeably larger cockatrice stares at you with gleaming eyes. Its soft down has shed, replaced by sleek new blue feathers that ruffle with a motion that seems quite pleased.)

quests.title: Finding a New Favorite
quests.text:
Grrr... Grrr...
(The young cockatrice scratches at the ground, seeming bored. Perhaps bringing it a unique treasure this time would be a good idea.)
quests.completion_text:
Grrr! Grrrr...
(The young cockatrice chirps happily at the sight of the chalice but completely ignores the ancient scroll. It seems uninterested in such things.)

quests.title: Preparation for a Companion Cockatrice
quests.text:
...
(It is said that a tamed cockatrice shows unwavering loyalty to its master. Moreover, rumor has it that from the moment it hatches, the more affection it feels toward its master, the more it brings trinkets it fancies as tokens of its fondness. If one wishes to test the truth of such tales by raising one from an egg, best start by preparing a proper nest. Thick leather would be a good place to begin.)
quests.completion_text:
...
(This thickness should be enough to keep the egg warm. Since cockatrices have a habit of hoarding treasures, it might be a good idea to place some in the nest beforehand.)

quests.title: Too Good to Refuse
quests.text: This strange experience will cause you no harm. Like a lucid dream, it will let you see the world from a new perspective. No one will ever know who you truly are, so there is no need to hesitate. Simply pay a trivial price, and savor the sweetest fruit.
quests.completion_text: Excellent. I am most curious what mark that special experience will leave upon you. May you savor its sweetness for long to come...

quests.title: What I Truly Desired
quests.text: This strange experience will cause you no harm. Like a lucid dream, it will let you see the world from a new perspective. No one will ever know who you truly are, so there is no need to hesitate. Simply pay a trivial price, and savor the sweetest fruit.
quests.completion_text: Excellent. I am most curious what mark that special experience will leave upon you. May you savor its sweetness for long to come...

quests.title: Where the Dead Whisper
quests.text: This strange experience will cause you no harm. Like a lucid dream, it will let you see the world from a new perspective. No one will ever know who you truly are, so there is no need to hesitate. Simply pay a trivial price, and savor the sweetest fruit.
quests.completion_text: Excellent. I am most curious what mark that special experience will leave upon you. May you savor its sweetness for long to come...

quests.title: Icy Fortune
quests.text: The Frost Mountain is known to have piles of treasure, but only the most daring adventurers have ever set their sights on them. That will be no problem for you though! Trust me, I have already seen your success.
quests.completion_text: The treasure was yours from the start, aren’t you glad you trusted me! You’re special, and I surely wouldn’t guide anyone else.

quests.title: Self Made Luck
quests.text: I need one more thing... and I know it won’t be easy to obtain, but with a few Luck Potions, however, you might manage it. Bring me a Wendigo Hoof, I will make it worth your time!
quests.completion_text: Yes! This is just what I needed to glimpse the other side... Oh, and here! Take this.

quests.title: Reflections of the Cursed
quests.text: Those who foresaw an ill-fated future, peers of mine in their own ways, have sent you to me. They understand that this curse is no simple illness. To break it, one must look beyond the limits of human sight. Bring me the items that allow a glimpse of the truth hidden in the dark. But be warned. Do not look into them too deeply.
quests.completion_text: Hm. A disturbing sight reveals itself. A guardian bound by magical chains... the one within the frost. It seems to be watching over the vessel that sustains the curse. Adventurer, seek out that creature and uncover the truth it hides. But be wary. This cold conceals far more than you realize.

quests.title: Remnants of the Inferno
quests.text: Demons with wicked souls and their hounds guard every corner of the Inferno... Because of them, we have yet to truly gaze into its depths... To draw even a little closer to the secrets of that dreadful place, I require an item bound to it. Could you bring me something tied to those fiends?
quests.completion_text: This aura of the demon... For an ordinary soul, merely being near it would bring peril... First, we must cleanse the ominous fluids that shroud it. You have done well.

quests.title: Webs of Fate
quests.text: When you visited the castle... Did you see them? Spiders are everywhere. I heard some rooms are so bad, you can’t walk without them biting at your ankles. They crawl out from those wretched pots that have been sitting in the castle untouched for years! If you destroy enough of those pots, it might send those spiders back into hiding for good.
quests.completion_text: That will show them! I don’t expect to hear any more stories about spiders haunting the halls of that cursed castle... Thanks again for all your efforts.

quests.title: Clearing The Way
quests.text: The late king installed Wall Spikes throughout The Forgotten Castle to keep wanderers away. With a little luck, I believe you could disarm them for safe passage. Just remember, sometimes, you have to create your own luck.
quests.completion_text: I told you, a little luck can make anything easier! The path may seem clear now, but I can’t shake an uneasy feeling about what lies ahead...

quests.title: That’s Batty
quests.text: The bats in this area are unlike any other... if you bring me two of their wings I’ll prove it to you! Just be careful, you aren’t the only adventurer on this journey... but you must be the first to complete it.
quests.completion_text: Finally! It took you long enough! I hope you kept the wings in one piece. Either way, these should do the trick.

quests.title: Dreamcatcher
quests.text: Lately I have had dreams that send chills down my spine... If only I could catch them, I might uncover their true meaning. Maybe you could help me do just that... but I will need some materials that only an adventurer like you can obtain.
quests.completion_text: These will do just the trick! Capturing these dreams is sure to unlock their secrets—and perhaps, bring you great fortune as well.

quests.title: Mysterious Vine
quests.text: There are things that grow only in the harsh reaches of the Blue Maelstrom. Among them, the Saltvine... is not consumed by the mouth, but by the mind. The Tidewalkers have known this truth since ancient days. When they perform their rites, they burn the vine and breathe its smoke. Adventurer, bring me a few strands of it as well. The time has come to kindle a new smoke.
quests.completion_text: Mmm... a powerful presence lingers here. The sound of waves, and faint whispers left behind... If your inner eye were open, you too might hear them one day. And now, I must do what I can with this. Seek the paths that have yet to be revealed...

quests.title: Source of Evil
quests.text: The item you brought last time proved most helpful. Yet to examine the depths of the Inferno more closely, I require more wicked relics bound to that place. If you aid me, we shall draw one step closer to uncovering the source of this evil. Clear away all that stands in your path.
quests.completion_text: The aura that emanates from here... it feels like evil itself. I have never encountered anything quite like it before. Yet it may be the only thread by which hope can be reclaimed.

quests.title: Voices of the Dead
quests.text: The eye failed us; its vision clouded... Sight has betrayed me, adventurer, but perhaps sound will not. The voices of the dead echo faintly, yearning to be heard. Deep within the caverns, the giant bats dwell, their ears attuned to the faintest of vibrations, even those that ripple from the beyond. Sever one ear from these shadowed predators—bloodied and raw—and bring it to me. Only then may we align with the spectral murmurs that seek to guide us.
quests.completion_text: You’ve done well. The ear still hums with unnatural resonance, as though it drinks in the very silence around us. Already, I feel the faint touch of voices long silenced, brushing against my thoughts. Yet, their message remains indistinct, a riddle without form. The connection must be strengthened, for the dead demand more than mere listening—they will soon seek communion. May the stars align in our favor.

quests.title: Frosty Bracelets
quests.text: Deep in the Icicle Cave lies a creature—not just a beast, but a sentinel tied to the curse’s very essence. Those who sent you here—my peers—they suspect its existence, and they are not wrong. But this guardian won’t reveal itself easily. Its servants, kobolds twisted by frost magic, will try to stop you. Bring me proof of their presence—primitive bracelets—and uncover what it is that this guardian protects. The truth is within reach, but beware: even knowledge can cut deeper than a blade.
quests.completion_text: So, the kobolds serve a greater purpose—a chain forged in magic and cruelty. The guardian itself is not merely a creature but a force, bound to keep the curse’s secrets buried in ice. This aligns with what I’ve learned from others, though they, too, only grasp pieces of the puzzle. The altar you unearthed—the one marked with sacrifice—resonates with this guardian’s power. There is but one step left, adventurer, and it is not one to take lightly.

quests.title: Blood for the Truth
quests.text: You’ve uncovered the cursed, their guardians, and their chains. Now you must take the final step—one that will demand more from you than any blade or spell. The Altar of Sacrifice, steeped in dark rituals, are tied to the curse’s power. They must be used—three times—to unravel the threads that bind this blight to our world. Know this: each use of the altar comes at a cost, and its echoes will follow you. But this is the only way to uncover the heart of the curse. Will you accept this burden, adventurer?
quests.completion_text: It is done. The altars scream with what you’ve torn from them—fragments of truth, drenched in blood. I see it clearly now: the curse’s origins lie not in flesh or stone, but in forces that reach beyond our understanding. The answers we’ve uncovered are but whispers of what’s to come. You’ve walked a path few dare tread, but the journey is not over. You must decide if you’ll face what lies ahead. The weight of this choice will be yours alone to bear.

quests.title: Traces of the Blessing
quests.text: Surviving the tempestuous sea is no small matter, even for monsters. It is said the Tidewalkers place enchanted necklaces upon the warriors who return from the maelstrom, gifts woven with a shaman's blessing. The warrior protects the shaman, and the shaman shields the tribe. I wonder what truths lie hidden within such a blessing. I will need a few items, worn and weathered by their hands.
quests.completion_text: Hmm... this is a very old kind of magic. Both the necklace and the fragment carry similar traces. This enchantment protects its bearer and strengthens the bond of trust between them. It seems well-suited to bind a tribe together as one. But I will need to study it further before I can say more.

quests.title: Premonitions of the Unknown
quests.text: The threads of fate twist and knot, veiling truths beyond our mortal sight. I have glimpsed a shadow, vast and formless, threatening to engulf the fragile balance of our world. Yet, my visions falter, shrouded in mist. We need a catalyst—something to pierce the veil. Deep within the cursed woods, the dire wolves prowl, their eyes glinting with unnatural light. One of their eyes must be extracted while the warmth of life still lingers—a gruesome act, but necessary. Bring me this eyeball, stained by blood, and together we shall unravel the first strand of this enigma.
quests.completion_text: Yes... the eye still gleams, its surface slick with gore. The blood of the beast has yet to dry—good. Its essence still thrums with the arcane. But as I gaze into its depths, the vision remains fractured, like shattered glass. The truth hides still, clawing at the edges of perception. Stay close, adventurer—the unknown awaits us.

quests.title: Judge of the Deep
quests.text: The great white shark is both warden and judge of the sea. If you intend to keep venturing out upon the waters, you must beware of them. These beasts show no mercy to those who trespass into their domain. Strike them down before they sink their teeth into you. I know you can do it. The stars shine upon your path. Now go, adventurer... and bring me the spoils of your victory.
quests.completion_text: Well done, adventurer. The warden sleeps, and you have endured the trial of the tides. Now the sea shall remember your name...

quests.title: Tongue Twister
quests.text: The whispers are growing louder, their cadence sharp and desperate, yet they remain beyond our grasp. The dead do not merely wish to be heard—they crave a voice to speak through. To bridge the chasm between our realm and theirs, we must bind the tangible to the ethereal. The tongue of a mimic, that vile creature born of deception, holds the power to weave words across worlds. Seek out one of these lurking horrors, wrest its tongue from its snapping maw, and bring it to me. Only then can we compel the dead to answer.
quests.completion_text: Ah, the mimic’s tongue... slick with malice, yet brimming with potential. Its grotesque vitality pulses in my hands—a perfect conduit. Stand close, adventurer, and witness the veil parting. The afflicted bear runes etched into their flesh, their tongues torn from their mouths. They become husks—empty, their will consumed, and soon, they die, as though they were never truly alive. The dead have spoken. Darkness stirs, adventurer—press on, for the truth will demand its due.

quests.title: Lights Out
quests.text: The Forgotten Castle appears to be well lit... well, let's change that. I need you to darken the place, and then once it is done you can use the shadows to aid you in taking care of anyone that intends to do you harm.
quests.completion_text: You truly made the shadows come alive in there... and I bet those following you couldn’t even see what was coming for them!

quests.title: An Unforgettable Taste
quests.text: Before I was exiled, I saw it once while wandering the caves. A lizard completely on fire. Just once. It vanished so fast I thought my eyes fooled me, but they didn’t. It left a burning tail behind! Haha! It saw Gobbo and ran off scared. I searched everywhere after that, never saw it again. But I know it’s still out there, in the burning lands.
quests.completion_text: Yes! This is it! I knew you’d bring the right thing, fleshy! Gobbo’s eyes never lie! Haha! To think I get to eat this again. Gotta let it cool first. Gobbo’s luck never runs out. Huh? You asking if I’m eating it? Of course! Want a bite?

quests.title: One Very Hot Bite
quests.text: Fleshy, bring me a few mushrooms from the burning lands. Those shrooms grow by drinking that bright red water, so they’re hot. Take one bite and your belly goes up in flames. You’ll be groaning for a week. Gobbo’s kind hates hot stuff, see. That’s why I’m gonna let them have a little taste... secretly!
quests.completion_text: Oho, still nice and warm! But these one’s are all black like that. Didn’t it burn completely? Even better! I’ll slip it right into their stew. Hehe. Eat this, you fools!

quests.title: Gobo Brawl
quests.text: Oh noes, they ain too happy I busted up their stuff. Me folk tink they smart but we show em. Send em a message that they be messin with the wrong bossman up here.
quests.completion_text: Dem gobbo heads smashed betta than those crates! Dat’ll show em whos da real bossman!

quests.title: Crate Chaos
quests.text: Me bruddas, always tryna hide me stuff from me. But I know where ta find em. Bash those boxes fer me and I reward ya real nice.
quests.completion_text: Bash! Bash! Bash! Musta been fun! Wish I coulda join in wid ya.

quests.title: Gamba
quests.text: Us green skins face a lotta dangers down in da caves. You wanna get a taste of da goblin life? Tryna dance with some of pets?
quests.completion_text: Yum! Centipede legs are crunchy delight. Here sum junk to make it a gud trade.

quests.title: A New Delicacy
quests.text: Hey! You heard about it? That new kind of buzzing bug in the caves! Go squash a few of them for me, will ya? I wanna see if they’ll make good stew meat for this gobbo’s next recipe! Heh heh... Flying skulls are no good for nothin’, but these bugs? Now those are juicy little bundles of nutrition!
quests.completion_text: Oh, now that’s tough. And a lot... bigger than I expected? Hrm, alright, it looks tasty. I like it, I really do! Might be better for something other than stew though... hmm, I’ll have to think on it. Meat lump, once it's done, I’ll let you know. I might even give you a bite, since it’s you.

quests.title: One Eyed Foe
quests.text: That stinky giant is trouble for all gobbo folk. Take em out and make it better for me and me friends!
quests.completion_text: Wowza! You a gobbo hero. Dun get comfy cuz dere be more dangers in da caves!

quests.title: Questionable Ingredients
quests.text: Ahh, fleshy! This time, it’s a different kind of job. Look, all that ruckus I caused? Well, now my gambling buddies are all riled up. They think ol’ gobbo forgot his roots, trying to fit in with fleshy customs. So, I’m gonna show them! I’ll make a special stew—so good, so distracting, they won’t care who I gamble with anymore! But to do that, I need the shell of a certain bug—shiny, tough! You bring me that shell, and maybe... just maybe... I’ll spill a little something about that woman you’re looking for. Something I heard. Hehehe.
quests.completion_text: Aha! That’s the one! You did it, fleshy friend! That’s the shell I needed for my glorious goblin stew. It’s feast time! And as promised, here’s a little secret—about the missing girl... She’s not what she seems, friend. It’s not just that she disappeared—there’s something more. But that’s all I can say for now. If you want the truth, you’ll have to dig deeper yourself. For now, let’s eat, and just remember—this gobbo always keeps his promises! Hehehe!

quests.title: The Way Out
quests.text: Ughhh! My stew! I can still hear their laughter ringing in my head! I won’t let this go, never! Listen, back when I was exiled, I used a secret path to escape. But that was a long time ago, and I don’t know if it’s still there. I need you to head into the caves and find that escape route for me. I’ve got plans, you see? Plans bigger than they can imagine... bigger than my stew... and when it’s all over, they’ll all say they regret ever crossing Gobbo!
quests.completion_text: Yahoo! You found the cursed escape route! We’re one step closer now, fleshy friend. Look, Gobbo’s been preparing something bigger than they could ever imagine. My kin will pay for every single thing they did to me. Trust Gobbo, fleshy—the time is coming soon... Gobbo’s big plan is gonna be way bigger than they expect—whoosh-BOOM! Hehehe!

quests.title: Easy Pickings
quests.text: So the cave went rumble and CRASH, huh?! Hahaha! All the fools who mocked me got what they deserved! I knew it! Down there it’s blazing hot, bright red water flowing everywhere. Don’t touch it, fleshy. Soft meat like yours would burn right up. Those idiots are probably ash by now... so dig through what’s left. Might be something useful, hehehe.
quests.completion_text: So? Find anything good in there? Gonna give some to me? Nah, keep it all. There’s something else I want anyway. Come back when you’ve got time! I’ll tell you what I’m really looking for!

quests.title: Grave Goods
quests.text: Had some bad luck gamba. Need to replenish my stock. Graves really good for finding good items.
quests.completion_text: Ooh! Lots of shinies! Hopefully no ghoulies followed you back.

quests.title: Away With The Green Skins
quests.text: Ah, my brilliant fleshy! The one who’ll take care of my wretched kin! Ha! Me? I was cast out of the caves, abandoned by my own kind! Those brainless green-skins—bah! My tribe thinks I wasted my time making fleshy friends and collecting shinies. They’re too stupid to see what truly matters. But me? I’m smart. Hehe. Let’s see how they fare without this gobbo! Now, get in that cave and give those traitors a proper beating! Don’t worry, fleshy friend—I’ll make sure your effort is worth it. Hehehe!
quests.completion_text: Huzzah! Well done, me fleshy friend. Those green skins didn’t know what hit ‘em! Ahh, there’s trouble brewin’. You see, me kin be stirred up now, all riled and angry. They’ll retaliate, mark me words... But with you, my fleshy friend, we boom boom bop 'em and they learns not to mess with Gobbo again!

quests.title: Reaping Without Effort
quests.text: Those wretched green-skins stole my shinies! So, they finally understand their value, huh? But laying their filthy hands on mine—that was a very stupid mistake. Hmph, fools should be left to deal with other fools. Fleshling, go steal some junk from the giants in the cave. And leave this behind. What is it? A stinking rag from those foolish green-skins.
quests.completion_text: Well done! I have no idea why they treasured that junk, but now that both are gone, they’ll be searching for quite some time. Just thinking about it is amusing! Now, those fools will take out their frustration on those infuriating green-skins for me!

quests.title: Blowing It All Away
quests.text: Alright. Last time, the plan was too clever. Looks like the giants just found themselves some new worthless junk to cherish. I completely forgot that those idiots don’t actually think. So this time, we’re going in loud and brutal. Teach those green-skins a lesson for ignoring me. There are plenty of goblin tribes out there—no one’s going to miss a few if they disappear.
quests.completion_text: That’s right, fleshling! I knew I could count on you! You know what the most obvious truth in the world is? You are useful to this goblin—they are not!

quests.title: Gobbo's Favorite Fleshy
quests.text: No! Something is terribly wrong! After we took down the green-skins, my kin went into a frenzy, and now they’ve set their sights on your kind! When I was cast out of the caves, my precious fleshies took me in, fed me, and treated me as more than just a greedy goblin—they treated me as a friend. But now... if they’re no longer here... No! Get inside that wretched prison and find out what’s become of them! Hurry, before it’s too late!
quests.completion_text: No, no, no, no... This isn’t right. My... my precious fleshy, the one who always protected me, they’re gone. Torn apart like they were nothing! Grrr... My kin will pay for this—every last one of them! Their ears will be my trophies! You hear me, fleshy? This gobbo’s gonna make them regret ever laying a hand on mine! Kurikuri goblins... Remember my words!

quests.title: Shiny Secrets
quests.text: Shinies? Me think I left too many of me shinies deep in da caves. Get em out for me and I give ya sumthin.
quests.completion_text: Huzzah! How ya open them big metal boxes. Me thought all dem shinies safe in dere.

quests.title: A Strange Omen
quests.text: Even after the lesson you taught them last time, those wretches are still after my treasure! The same fools who once ignored me over a few shinies! Hey, are you sure you didn’t mess something up when dealing with the green-skins? Why are they acting like this? Ugh, I can’t stand not knowing! Fleshling! Ransack the entire cave! Turn it upside down and leave nothing untouched!
quests.completion_text: What? They had a lot of weapons? How many—piled up like a stockpile? Hmm, that is strange. What are they planning...? Thanks, fleshling! I’ll take it from here and dig deeper!

quests.title: Feathered Fortune
quests.text: Me be havin no luck lately. Fetch me a lucky feather from dem nasty birdies to change me luck.
quests.completion_text: Huzzah! With dis lucky feather, me fortunes sure ta change!

quests.title: Boom Goes the Bad Ones
quests.text: Me look around, me see it real weird. Real real weird! Bad smell, bad plan! Some goblins, real nasty ones, me old tribe. They say "kick him out!" They say "he not goblin enough!" Pah! Now they bossin’ others like they king or something. Why need so many weapons, huh? What for? Big fight? Big boom? Maybe war? Crazy! Crazy like cave bat with fire on tail! Fleshthing, you do it. You smash bad goblins. Break traps too, all of them. Wreck the whole nasty hole!
quests.completion_text: Good good, you did real good! Perfect! Shame me not see their stupid faces all squished on floor, hah! But anyway, from today, you my most precious fleshthing! Hehehe!

quests.title: A Goblin’s Pride
quests.text: My kin will regret ever laying a hand on my precious fleshy friend. Now, it’s time for gobbo’s revenge! Boom, boom! Look, ears are a goblin’s pride, like a badge of honor. So if we take down those stinking green-skins, we’ll crush their pride! Bring me eight of their ears, and let’s stomp their dignity into the dirt! Hehe! I promise, fleshy—you’ll get a real special reward for your effort! And those goblins? They’ll learn never to mess with this gobbo!
quests.completion_text: Good, good! I like this! You... you might just become gobbo’s new precious fleshy... Hehe. Look at that—eight shiny goblin ears, stacked up nice and pretty. Hehehe, those filthy green-skins don’t even know what hit ‘em! Right now, their pride? It’s mine. Well done, squishy friend. But this isn’t the end. Oh no, my kin still have lessons to learn... and it’s gonna be real rough for them.

quests.title: Gobbo's Famous Grubs
quests.text: Oh! My fleshy friend, listen up! I made a stew with my kin— ‘Gobbos Famous Grubs’! But those stinking green-skins turned their noses up at it, calling it ‘disgusting’! Ha! Fine, now they’re gonna taste gobbo’s fury at full strength! The worst of ‘em was a goblin mage—he mocked me the most. Find him and teach him a lesson! Oh, and while you’re at it, bring me some centipedes and spiders. Then I’ll show you how to make a legendary Famous Grubs that no one will ever forget!
quests.completion_text: Ha! That’s more like it! The mage won’t be talkin’ down on my Famous Grubs stew ever again, no sir! And with the centipedes and spiders you bopped, me next batch’s gonna be fit for a gob king! Me kin will eat those words, heh-heh, next time, they’ll beg for more! You did good, fleshy—me’ll make sure your shiny reward just as special as me stew. Hee-hee!

quests.title: Shaking Off Misfortune
quests.text: Fleshling! Wait, don’t come any closer. Over there—take a step back! You know it too, right? My luck has been terrible lately. I asked the Fortune teller, and she said I’ve been cursed by bad energy from someone nearby! And you know what? I only have one friend—you. That means you’re the problem. That woman said it—you have to go back to the Ruins. If you want to shake off the misfortune clinging to your back, you have no choice. Again, again, again!
quests.completion_text: Alright, friend. You’re finally looking a bit better. While you were getting rid of the bad stuff, I managed to score a little something myself. Actually, you ended up tossing out my bad luck too. Heh. So, I suppose I owe you something shiny. Not bad, right?

quests.title: How to Enhance Equipment
quests.text: Well met! If you’re looking to enhance your gear with gemstones, you’ve come to the right place. There aren’t many gemcutters who can handle both cutting and socketing like I can. Keeping my skills sharp takes constant practice. If you don’t mind, bring me a few gems. A few flaws won’t be a problem.
quests.completion_text: These aren’t bad. Barely good enough for gear of similar quality, perhaps, but they’ll do for practice. Thanks. I’ll be asking you again from time to time.

quests.title: A Short Break
quests.text: Lately, I’ve been researching whether there might be ways to work with a wider variety of minerals. I knew it wouldn’t be difficult, but it’s proving to be no easy task. That said, after concentrating all day, I’m quite hungry. Sorry to ask, but could you bring me something to eat?
quests.completion_text: Hm, this is delicious. Where did you get it? ...Somewhere I wouldn’t recognize, you say? Well, as long as it tasted good, that’s enough for me. I’ll be counting on you again next time.

quests.title: Stocking up
quests.text: Lately, the demand for silver has been rising. It’s sought after not only by the upper class, but by adventurers as well. I’d like to stock up a bit before it’s too late. My tools are also due for replacement, so if possible, could you bring me some silver along with them? I’d appreciate it.
quests.completion_text: Thank you. This should be more than enough for my research. There’s still plenty I’ll need help with, so please stop by again when you have the time.

quests.title: Always in Short Supply
quests.text: Gemcrafting requires more tools than you might expect. The ones I use most wear out quickly. I usually keep spares on hand, but it seems I’ve run through a few without noticing. I’ll let you know what I need, so if possible, please bring several of each. Oh, and don’t forget the Rubysilver ingots as well.
quests.completion_text: Well done. Thanks to you, my storeroom is much better stocked now. I won’t have to worry for a while. Thank you.

quests.title: Finer Gem
quests.text: The quality of a gem has to match the quality of the gear it’s set into. Only then can socketing truly bring out its full power. It’s a demanding craft, so I’m always working to refine my skills. Bring me some gems today. Just make sure they’re of better quality than last time.
quests.completion_text: Very good. This is quite impressive. If you bring your requests to me from now on, I can offer you work of an even higher standard. Well done.

quests.title: Getting Used to Fine Gems
quests.chapter: What It Takes to Become a Master
quests.text: I’m confident in my skills, which is why I never want to ruin a job. When I work with rare, high-grade gems, my nerves get so tight it almost makes my stomach ache. I suppose it’s because I’m not used to it yet. There’s no choice but to practice more. For now, please bring me high-quality rubies and diamonds.
quests.completion_text: By the stars, look at the light passing through this gem. Truly magnificent. My fingers are itching to start working on it right away. I’m glad I asked you, Adventurer.

quests.title: Reading the Differences in Gems
quests.chapter: What It Takes to Become a Master
quests.text: Did you know? Every gemstone differs subtly in hardness. Being able to read those differences precisely is one of a gemcutter’s key skills. Now that we’ve worked with rubies and diamonds, it’s time to turn our attention to other gems. Sapphires and emeralds would be ideal. I’ll leave it to you.
quests.completion_text: Truly impressive. With someone like you, Adventurer, I can’t help but believe you’ll one day bring back even legendary gems. Well done.

quests.title: Trying Different Approaches
quests.chapter: What It Takes to Become a Master
quests.text: Adventurer, I’ve been waiting for you. This time as well, I’d like you to gather some gemstones and minerals for my work. If you happen to come across anything that might be useful for reference in gemcrafting, I’d appreciate it if you could bring that along too. Slightly damaged items are fine, so could you bring several if possible?
quests.completion_text: You’ve brought everything I asked for, just as promised. With such a range of conditions, there’s a great deal to examine. If it weren’t for you, Adventurer, I wouldn’t have even considered trying so many different approaches. You have my sincere thanks.

quests.title: Legendary Gemstones
quests.text: I feel that I am ready now. Ready to work with legendary gemstones. It will not be an easy task, of course. Still, the experience I have built up should allow me to focus properly on the work. If you are willing to help me, I could not ask for more. Shall we begin with rubies?
quests.completion_text: Such a radiant crimson glow. It truly is different. I know well that chances to work with gemstones like this do not come easily. This is all thanks to you, Adventurer.

quests.title: Balance and Judgment
quests.text: Now that I have warmed up with rubies, sapphires would be a good next step. Sapphires are gemstones where subtle balance matters greatly. A single poor judgment can dull their brilliance. That is why they are well suited for this stage. Please bring me sapphires. The more you can provide, the better.
quests.completion_text: You have done well. Every sapphire you brought is in excellent condition. Their balance is already well set, so now it comes down to how carefully I handle them. I will proceed with great care.

quests.title: Catching One’s Breath
quests.text: When you work with similar materials for too long, there comes a moment when the hand grows dull. Like now. At times like this, it helps to handle materials of a different nature for a while. Gold and pearls should be suitable. Please bring ones of decent quality.
quests.completion_text: I was right to ask you, Adventurer. The materials you brought are in excellent condition. This should be enough to restore my working rhythm.

quests.title: The Beauty of Restraint
quests.text: Now that my sense of touch has fully returned, I am ready to resume working with legendary gemstones. This time, I would like you to bring me diamonds. Diamonds demand precise angles and restrained polishing. They will help me refine my skills further.
quests.completion_text: If crafted properly, there are few gemstones as beautiful as diamonds. They are so hard that there is little need to worry about flaws. Now then, shall we move on to another gemstone?

quests.title: The Edge of Delicacy
quests.text: Emeralds are gemstones with an unusually delicate nature among minerals. They may appear hard at first glance, but even a small lapse can leave a mark. That is why delicacy matters more than force when working with them. Could you bring me emeralds this time?
quests.completion_text: Thank you very much. If it were not for you, I would never have had the chance to work with such a wide range of gemstones of this quality. If you ever have work you wish to entrust to me, please let me know. I will always give it my highest priority.

quests.title: A Mysterious Mineral
quests.text: I heard that obsidian can be obtained. That is truly surprising. Obsidian is so rare that it is difficult even to see it in person. If possible, could you bring me some obsidian? The more, the better. I will also need a few materials that suit it. I will write down what is required. I ask this of you.
quests.completion_text: Perfect. Opportunities to work with a combination like this are rare. Thanks to you, I can finally attempt a project I had only imagined before. Thank you very much for your help.

quests.title: Hands of Precision
quests.text: Gem socketing is an extremely delicate craft. Lose focus for even a moment, and the whole piece is ruined. Opportunities to work with high-grade gems are rare, which only makes me more particular. That said, do you think you could bring me a few rare gemstones, if possible?
quests.completion_text: As expected, I knew you wouldn’t disappoint me. I can’t deny that you’ve had a significant impact on improving my craft lately. I look forward to working with you again.

quests.title: Weekly Mission
quests.text: I have a strong preference for the capable. Only those kinds of people survive in a place like this. If you're looking for work, I’ve got plenty. But you'd better deliver results.
quests.completion_text: Not a bad display of skill. You might be ready for something a bit more challenging. I’ll be expecting your next visit.

quests.title: Daily Mission
quests.text: I have a strong preference for the capable. Only those kinds of people survive in a place like this. If you're looking for work, I’ve got plenty. But you'd better deliver results.
quests.completion_text: Not a bad display of skill. You might be ready for something a bit more challenging. I’ll be expecting your next visit.

quests.title: Tainted Candy
quests.text: These lovely tricolored candies are a special treat found only this season. But there’s a problem. The old corpses in the dungeons have made the candies taste strange. There’s not a trace of sweetness left! Please, adventurer, get rid of those awful things spoiling the world’s sweetness.
quests.completion_text: Yes, that’s it! At last, these adorable treats will regain their original sweetness. Ah, this scent... I can finally feel my appetite coming back. Thank you so much!

quests.title: True Sweetness
quests.text: Nothing makes the world happier than sweetness. Thanks to you, the cause of that strange taste is gone, so now it’s time to enjoy the real thing. Bring me plenty of delicious candies, and I’ll trade you whatever you want from my collection. They’re of no use to me anyway.
quests.completion_text: So many candies! All right, now I understand. This is that thrilling taste you were talking about. At last, I understand you. Now it’s my turn to make you happy!

quests.title: The Taste of Escape
quests.text: Did you know there’s a kind of taste you don’t feel on your tongue but at your fingertips? They say adventurers like you enjoy that thrill. Some even get addicted, going back to the dungeons again and again. I’m curious, what does it taste like? Will you go and tell me when you return?
quests.completion_text: Hmm, since I can’t taste it myself, I can’t quite understand what you mean. Things that aren’t sweet just don’t make sense to me. Speaking of which, would you like some candy? I found it in a dungeon, and it’s absolutely delicious. No? Really? How sad... not to know the joy of such a delightful flavor!

quests.title: Treasure Hunt
quests.text: A festival wouldn’t be complete without a treasure hunt. I’ve hidden my small, adorable treasures all over the place. They make a very clear sound, so they won’t be too hard to find. Just bring me ten. Easy enough, right?
quests.completion_text: Good. No more, no less, exactly ten. I’ll take them. I’m looking forward to the next time. You didn’t think this was the end, did you?

quests.title: Rest for the Dead
quests.text: I’m fair to everyone. But festivals are for the living. The dead still shambling around don’t suit this happy season. Would you take care of them for me?
quests.completion_text: Alright, well done. They’ve been wandering around long enough. It’s time for them to rest now. For a very long time.

quests.title: Winter’s Chaos
quests.text: I like those who take action, no matter what. A life spent standing still is boring. So this time, why don’t you do what you enjoy? Wreck every dungeon you can, and make it back alive.
quests.completion_text: You made it back. The places you passed through have gotten pretty noisy. I like that. Don’t stop now.

quests.title: Krampus’ Small Gift
quests.text: Only those who are truly enjoying this winter’s festival can claim my Golden Bell. Bring me one, and I’ll give you a small gift in return.
quests.completion_text: Here you go. A small, charming reward, fitting for a single Golden Bell. If you want something better, try throwing yourself into the festival a little more.

quests.title: Krampus’ Decent Gift
quests.text: Only those who are truly enjoying this winter’s festival can claim my Golden Bell. Five of them means you did more than just watch, so I’ll have a decent reward ready for you.
quests.completion_text: Not bad. Here’s a reward fitting for five Golden Bells. If you want something more special, you’d better stir up the festival a bit more.

quests.title: Krampus’ Special Gift
quests.text: Only those who are truly enjoying this winter’s festival can claim my Golden Bell. Fifteen of them means you’ve completely taken over the festival, so you can expect something special.
quests.completion_text: Excellent. You’ve had a truly remarkable winter. I can vouch for that. I’ll be sure to tell Nicholas that this year, there was someone extraordinary.

quests.title: Plundering the Plunder
quests.text: Ever since you shattered all the crates in their cave, the goblins have begun hoarding their loot in golden chests, or so I’ve heard. Their senseless raids haven’t stopped either. Adventurer, this time I ask you to target the golden chests. Take as many as you can.
quests.completion_text: The goblins I knew used to care for little more than food. They never fought to gather weapons or trinkets like they do now. It's strange... deeply so. I fear what might lie at the end of this unnatural behavior.

quests.title: Frosty Encounters
quests.text: The Frost Mountain is crawling with angry little Kobolds and animated Skeletons! If you can help clear the place up I might have something for you... also... bring back proof of your work.
quests.completion_text: Ears and bones... Not quite what I had in mind when I said 'proof,' but I suppose they'll do!

quests.title: Ominous Movements
quests.text: The goblins have taken to raiding the merchant caravans passing through these parts, and even the materials I purchased with what little coin I had have vanished in one of their attacks. I can't make sense of what’s driving them, nor do I have the strength to fight back myself, but we can't simply let this go. If you find any crates in their cave, break them. Smash every last one you see. They must be made to answer for what they've done.
quests.completion_text: Thank you for what you’ve done. They won’t be thinking they can raid and plunder without consequence any longer. Still... it troubles me. I’ve never seen goblins act with such coordination before. This sort of behavior... it’s not like them. Not in the old days.

quests.title: Oaken Up
quests.text: I heard you can find all sorts of things inside Oak Chests scattered throughout The Frost Mountain... Would you mind opening a few for me?
quests.completion_text: You found all of that in just 10 Oak Chests? With loot like that, I bet it wasn’t easy!

quests.title: Faith and Worry
quests.text: The skeletons in the Forgotten Castle are always a trouble. Especially for the inexperienced, who often panic at their strange, jerking movements and end up badly hurt. I ask that you clear out some of those creatures, for the sake of the ones who have only just begun their journey. But even for someone as seasoned as you, carelessness can be dangerous. Please, adventurer... do not let yourself be harmed.
quests.completion_text: It brings me true relief to see you return in one piece. I had faith in your skill, of course, but the worry... it never truly leaves me. Now that I’ve seen you safe, perhaps tonight, I might finally get a bit of sleep.

quests.title: Time to Heal
quests.text: The Ruins have long been a place of both promise and peril. It reminds me of how much my daughter always fancied the statues in that forsaken place. My searches there have yielded little, but perhaps you might discover something new.
quests.completion_text: Accept these tokens of my thanks, and be sure to return soon—I have other tasks that could benefit from your skills.

quests.title: Warlord’s Bane
quests.text: You’ve proven yourself worthy of a task I once deemed unspeakable. The fallen warlord who haunts the Crypts with his deathly grip has revealed himself once more. I cannot say how much longer his presence will endure, now is the time to act!
quests.completion_text: It is true! The souls are free, and his corrupted blade lies in pieces! This victory will echo in songs sung at the Tavern for generations! No reward could ever fully honor this deed, but I hope these weapons serve as a worthy start!

quests.title: Strange Kinship
quests.text: The most dangerous creatures in the goblin cave are the cyclops and the troll. Folks have long hoped the two would turn on each other, but strangely enough, some sort of bond seems to have formed between them. Friendship between monsters... I can't understand it, and truth be told, I’d rather not. Take them both down, and bring back whatever spoils you find.
quests.completion_text: Truly remarkable. Your skill only seems to grow with time. You've more than earned a reward befitting your ability. I hope it pleases you.

quests.title: Campfire Tales
quests.text: Good to see you again. Those old campsites in the Ruins were once places of respite for us. Travelers and trappers alike knew them well. Search these areas for any hints that might shed light on my daughter’s whereabouts.
quests.completion_text: Your efforts are deeply appreciated. Every day, I grow more weary, but I cannot give up hope. The woodsman has also tirelessly assisted me in this search, and I believe he harbors a special fondness for her. Thank you for persisting.

quests.title: Echoes of Memory
quests.text: Not long ago, a new band of adventurers passed through here. Did you happen to see them? Strangely enough, they were made up just like the group my daughter once traveled with... It brought back memories I hadn’t touched in years. I’d like to offer them a small kindness, if I may. They’re young still, and it shows in the state of their armor. If you could help me gather some gear and fabric, I would see it properly repaid.
quests.completion_text: Thank you. With a bit of mending, these should do well enough. I only hope this helps keep those young ones a little safer. After all, there's nothing more important than returning home alive... to the ones waiting for you. You take care as well, adventurer. Do you understand?

quests.title: The Shadow of the Dream
quests.text: Last night, I had a dreadful dream. My daughter was crying out from deep within the Inferno. I was frozen in place, unable to move a single step, and all I could do was watch as she suffered in the distance. Adventurer, will you go to the Inferno on my behalf? There is something there, I am certain of it. Please, find it. Please, help put an end to my daughter's tears.
quests.completion_text: This... this was found there? No, no. This is not my daughter. It cannot be. It must not be. No... Please... I cannot believe it. I will not believe it. Please, leave me now. I... I must go to the alchemist. Perhaps he can tell me whose remains these truly are...

quests.title: Whispers in the Ruins
quests.text: The last place my daughter went was the Ruins. After all word of her was lost, I searched that place time and again but found nothing. Now I only hope to find even the smallest trace of her, even if it is found among the monsters that roam the Ruins.
quests.completion_text: You have my thanks. It is disappointing that nothing was found, but in a way it is also a relief. It must mean there is still hope. Even so, the passing of time takes its toll. I can only hope this worn body holds out until I find my daughter.

quests.title: Cap-tivating Adventures
quests.text: Greetings, adventurer. I need leather caps—any type will do. They’ll be essential for keeping our fellow adventurers warm as they help with the search. Your assistance in gathering these would be greatly appreciated.
quests.completion_text: Ah, these are perfect and will be useful in other searches as well. Thank you. She’s as adventurous as they come. If you happen to hear anything, please let me know.

quests.title: Into The Abyss
quests.text: There’s word of an Ice Abyss hidden deep with the depths of The Frost Mountain... Ice Hounds and Frost Sentinels are said to be a common sight down there... take a look for me, will ya?
quests.completion_text: You really went down there, and lived to tell the tale... I knew you were up for it. By the way... Did you hear anything unusual while you were down there?

quests.title: Dukes of The Dead
quests.text: Death’s lieutenants have corrupted every corner of The Forgotten Castle. Eliminating them will deliver an irreparable blow to their evil. This is just the beginning of cleansing our land.
quests.completion_text: This blow will be noticed by the warlord himself... His presence weakens with every act of justice, bringing us closer to breaking his hold over the Crypts.

quests.title: The Land in Flames
quests.text: Through our misguided choices, the calamity of fire that lay dormant, Ignir, has awakened. I barely managed to escape that place, but many of my kin are still held there, bound by his control. To save them, I will need your help, Adventurer. But before I ask you to take on such danger, I must be certain that this is something you can endure.
quests.completion_text: You’ve returned safely. That is a relief. Seeing you come back unharmed gives me a small measure of hope.

quests.title: Traces of the Scattered
quests.text: When I fled my homeland, there were companions who escaped alongside me. But in the chaos of our flight, the bridge we were crossing collapsed, and we were scattered apart. Since then, I have heard nothing of them... Please investigate the site where the bridge fell. I hope it is not so, but if you discover anything, let me know.
quests.completion_text: It is truly a relief that nothing was found. The thought that they may still be alive somewhere has eased my heart. I can only hope that they have escaped the danger and found a safe place to hide.

quests.title: Those Bound in Fire
quests.text: Could you check on the condition of my kin. Ignir slowly eroded our minds, until he finally seized our will and forced us to labor for him alone. But if there is even one who still retains their senses, I do not wish to abandon them. Even if conflict arises in the process, it may simply be unavoidable.
quests.completion_text: ...So none of them returned with their senses intact. I had considered that possibility, yet hearing it spoken aloud weighs heavily on my heart... Still, this guilt is mine to bear as well.

quests.title: Beasts in the Flames
quests.text: Ignir has twisted not only my kin, but also the beasts of that land. They were once animals we raised, but now they wander through the flames, stripped of reason and driven to rage. If left unchecked, they will become a greater threat. Put them down and bring back what remains as proof.
quests.completion_text: Well done. They were once companions who shared in our quiet daily lives. It seems so much was lost because of our misguided choices.

quests.title: Unbelievable News
quests.text: Those who recently returned from my homeland say they found the bodies of our kin there. But when I escaped that place, they were still alive, though under control. I do not know what happened in the time between. Adventurer, please examine the condition of the fallen and report back to me.
quests.completion_text: I can hardly believe some of the bodies are already reduced to bone. It seems Ignir is corrupting everything in that place. We must stop him before it is too late.

quests.title: Servant of Fire
quests.text: My kin who have been enthralled continue to dig without rest. As a result, the lava fields have spread, and a lava golem has emerged. That golem is, for all intents and purposes, a thrall of Ignir. As Ignir’s influence grows, the golem’s strength will grow with it. We must bring that creature down before it is too late.
quests.completion_text: You have done well. Thanks to you, Ignir’s influence has been pushed back, if only for a short while. But it will not last. He can always create new servants. We must now prepare for the next step.

quests.title: To find an opening
quests.chapter: The Fire That Will Not End
quests.text: Before we confront Ignir, it would be wise to assess his current state. Please investigate the area around the great forge. Observe the condition of the flames and the flow of the lava, then report back. As Ignir is devoting his strength to expanding his control, he cannot be maintaining perfect command over everything. We must find that opening.
quests.completion_text: The instability in the flow of fire is an important sign. It likely means that Ignir’s power is being spread thin as he expands his dominion. We must act quickly.

quests.title: Final Preparations
quests.chapter: The Fire That Will Not End
quests.text: Fire spirits and elementals are beings that aid Ignir in restoring his strength. They act as conduits, gathering the power of fire and delivering it to him. If left alone, the scattered power will quickly come together again. To slow that process, even if only a little, we must eliminate them.
quests.completion_text: Well done. We have now made all the preparations we can. With those who aid Ignir lying low, we must not let this opportunity slip away. When you are ready, please come to me.

quests.title: The Incomplete Colossus
quests.chapter: The Fire That Will Not End
quests.text: According to legend, a fully awakened Ignir is a being made solely of living lava. But due to the seal breaking incompletely, he now bears the form of a colossus, solid stone entwined with molten fire. We must stop him before he regains his true form. Adventurer, please put an end to him.
quests.completion_text: This will not be the end. Spirits like Ignir do not fade so easily. He is likely hiding within the lava, waiting for another chance. Before he can regain his strength, I will seek a way to seal him completely. Thank you, truly, for all the help you have given us.

quests.title: The Price of Loyalty
quests.text: The Black Despair pirates are blindly loyal to their captain. They’ve long claimed dominion over these seas, plundering and burning countless ships. Now it’s time they were repaid in kind.
quests.completion_text: Well done. They seemed unstoppable, and yet... here we are. Victory, at last. Now, only one step remains. Adventurer, I need your strength one final time.

quests.title: The Knot That Binds All
quests.text: Once you’ve been aboard a ship, you’ll come to see just how many ropes are used throughout. They wear down quickly, and constant maintenance is a part of life at sea. Bring me several ropes. It’s all right if some are worn. I can trim away the bad sections and salvage the rest. As long as the critical lines are secured, we’ll be ready to depart.
quests.completion_text: Thank you, adventurer. Thanks to you, my ship feels reborn. Guiding a strong vessel swiftly and safely is what I do best. I may well be the one who’s sailed near the Blue Maelstrom more than anyone alive. Now, at last, I can return to the sea.

quests.title: For a Sturdy Hull
quests.text: Well met, adventurer. Might I ask for your aid in repairing this old ship? With a bit of work, she could sail again as a proper merchant vessel. Should you choose to help, you’ll be fairly rewarded. For now, I’ll need stout timber, strong enough to hold against the sea’s fury.
quests.completion_text: This is good quality. With timber this sturdy, it shouldn’t break easily. I’ll begin repairs on the deck and hull with what you’ve brought. There’s still more work to be done, so I may ask for your help again soon.

quests.title: Trial of Worth
quests.text: Each of us has our strengths. I know how to command a ship, but I'm no fighter. That is why I’ve been searching for someone who could stand in my place, someone skilled in both battle and survival. Someone who could help me see my revenge through. Adventurer, will you show me what you’re capable of?
quests.completion_text: Thank you for accepting, even though it was no simple request. I swore I would do whatever it takes to avenge my fallen crew, no matter how difficult the path. And to do that, I need the help of someone like you. I’ll be counting on you from here on.

quests.title: Brawler of the Sea
quests.text: The Tidewalkers are a troublesome foe. Once they spot an enemy, they attack without hesitation, no matter the circumstance. They're especially aggressive when accompanied by one of their shamans, so caution is advised. A scouting party I sent out recently has run into serious trouble because of them. I could use your help. Subdue them, if you can.
