We”ll have to travel back to the swords resting place and unveil its tainted history. Maybe those forsaken frost spiders guarding it that have plagued my lineage for centuries will give us a clue.

quests.title: The Potential of Obsidian
quests.text: Obsidian is so rare that it is usually traded only as expensive jewelry. But weapons forged from obsidian are said to be sharper than those made from any other material. If you can bring me a small amount of obsidian, I will try forging one myself.
quests.completion_text: Well done. This is the first time I have seen an obsidian ore of this size. The dwarves must have refined their craft by working with many different minerals since long ago. For a craftsman like me, this is like a dream come true.

quests.title: Culling the Enemy
quests.text: Good timing. Unfortunately, we’ll have to put our side mission on hold. A surge in monsters is wreaking havoc, and I’m almost certain it’s tied to what we were investigating. It feels like something doesn’t want us getting any closer. Even my trade routes are overrun by these beasts, so the sooner you help me clear them out, the sooner we can get back on track.
quests.completion_text: Well done, adventurer. With those beasts cleared out, my trade routes are safe again, and we can finally get back on track. I have a feeling we’re closer to uncovering the truth than ever before. Hopefully, nothing else slows us down.

quests.title: Growing Whispers
quests.text: These spiders aren’t just creatures—they’re part of the curse that has followed my family for generations. My great-grandfather fought them, and it nearly destroyed him. Clear the way—kill three of them—and I can study the sword in peace. We’re too close now.
quests.completion_text: They’re dead, but something isn’t right. I can feel the sword changing me, just like it did my great-grandfather...The whispers are growing louder. I’m not sure how much longer I can resist... But we can’t stop now. I’ll need more from you soon...

quests.title: Refinement of Craft
quests.text: Forging ordinary weapons is not particularly difficult. But producing an exceptional weapon is an entirely different matter. The strength and balance a fine weapon must possess can never be fully learned by study alone. So if you bring me weapons that are a step above the last batch, I will use them as the basis to craft an even finer piece.
quests.completion_text: Well done. All of this will serve as the foundation for me to make better weapons. Here, I present a new piece I recently completed. May it be of service to you, adventurer.

quests.title: The Craftsman’s Fruit
quests.text: Adventurer, the time has come to take on a new tier. Drawing on the experience I have amassed, I intend to forge a weapon surpassing anything I have made so far. To complete it properly I require your aid. If you would procure for me several rare weapons not easily obtained, I shall present to you the fruit of my labour.
quests.completion_text: Well done. Thanks to you I have gained much insight and was able to complete this weapon. For now, this is the best my craft can achieve, but I will continue to strive ceaselessly to create something more perfect. For I know that effort will never betray me.

quests.title: A Lot of Pots
quests.text: That castle is filled with old pots, I once found a legendary Falchion inside one. Why not shatter a few and see what fortune awaits? It’s tradition around these parts.
quests.completion_text: You might not have found anything legendary, but at least have these weapons for your trouble.

quests.title: Golden Dreams
quests.text: If you are willing to push the limits of your safety, I can make it worth your time! I just need you to open a few Golden Chests, they are plentiful inside The Forgotten Castle. By the way, you’ll need to bring lockpicks to open those chests!
quests.completion_text: I knew you wouldn’t regret it! Just look at all the valuables you brought back... and you get to keep this gift from me!

quests.title: Piercing Heat
quests.text: I have been racking my brain lately, trying to forge a weapon with greater power. Yet with the materials I possess, I cannot bring my idea to life. There are a few things I require, rare and not easily found. Will you help me?
quests.completion_text: Thank you. If this turns out as I envision, it will be a weapon unlike any other. When that time comes, I shall craft one for you.

quests.title: The Statues Are Alive
quests.text: Some fool came into the Tavern last night speaking of “Living Statues” flying around the Ruins... I haven’t ever seen such a thing, but would you mind taking a look?
quests.completion_text: Wow... and here I was thinking how ridiculous that sounded. Those Ruins are getting more dangerous by the day.

quests.title: Gathering Progress
quests.text: Remember that list I mentioned earlier with the glowing bug parts? There are a few more items we need to gather: some rotten fluids, high quality weapons, and ten armor scraps. It’s not a pleasant task, but I know you can handle it.
quests.completion_text: Excellent work. While my wife’s health remains unchanged, the presence of family has lifted my spirits. These items should help us make progress, and I’m grateful for your dedication.

quests.title: Ember's Amidst Frost
quests.text: Nothing better to test your fire making skills in the most inhospitable environment known to man. Get to it! Practice makes perfect.
quests.completion_text: Ah, nothing more comforting than a crackling campfire amidst the chill of the frost.

quests.title: Foulburster
quests.text: It seems the insects of the Inferno have evolved into something even more vile. The demon flies are said to explode in front of their chosen target, dealing harm in the blast. Truly revolting creatures. We must deal with these filthy pests before they spread any further.
quests.completion_text: Well done. This should keep things under control for a while. But since we still don't know the source of those creatures, all we can do is clear them out from time to time. I’ll be counting on you again when the time comes.

quests.title: Haunting Presence
quests.text: I used to have a keen sense to detect demonic auras in my youth. Alas, these days that skill has gone to waste. I am curious if you can replicate my odd abilities.
quests.completion_text: Your skills are impressive as always. Unfortunately your report seems to indicate that darkness has overtaken the castle.

quests.title: Amidst Peril
quests.text: That forsaken castle has become the final resting ground for too many overconfident adventurers. I’m not saying you’re the same as the rest but I’d be surprised if you could survive more than once.
quests.completion_text: I was a fool for ever doubting your skills. Here, take these items as a token of my apology.

quests.title: Infernal Champions
quests.text: The demonic aura coming from the depths of the castle are so powerful that even my waning abilities can sense them. We need a hero to cleanse the air.
quests.completion_text: By the gods! You’ve done it. I haven’t felt this calm in years. Unfortunately, I’m not sure how long this will last.

quests.title: Frostbound Carnage
quests.text: The giant folk have been making trouble on the peaks. Clear the way for other adventurers and search parties by showing them who’s boss.
quests.completion_text: Impressive! Those giants are renown for their strength and you made it look easy!

quests.title: Arctic Invaders
quests.text: It’s time to make those ghastly beasts pay for the chaos they’ve unleashed on the mountains.
quests.completion_text: A fine job in thinning out the forces of evil.

quests.title: Frostborn Beasts
quests.text: Something has gotten into the beasts on the frozen peaks. They have been exhibiting more aggression than before. It’s time to put an end to their menace.
quests.completion_text: You've done good work here, but always remember—the mountain never rests.

quests.title: Collect and Deliver
quests.text: I’ve heard that the frost demons have enlisted even more legendary creatures to do their biddings. Bring me proof of their existence.
quests.completion_text: Good job. I know that taking out those beasts were no easy task. I only hope we put a dent in the plans of the frost demons.

quests.title: Frozen Enigmas
quests.text: I’ve heard that the depths of the Frost Mountain hold a dangerous secret. Can you explore it and let me know what you find?
quests.completion_text: A frost wyvern?! My dear, what could have compelled the demons to capture such a terrifying beast?

quests.title: Invasive Species
quests.text: A lot of people are helping in the search for the Leathersmith's lost daughter, but not all of them are as capable as you. There’s plenty of inexperienced souls stumbling into the wilderness, thinking they can handle it. It’s up to us to clear the path and make it safer for those who don't have the skills. We don’t want them getting in the way or becoming another burden.
quests.completion_text: Nice job. The path is clearer now, and those less prepared have a better shot at staying alive. It won’t be easy, but you’ve given them a damn good chance. I appreciate the help—stay sharp; we’ve still got a long way to go.

quests.title: Absolutely Batty
quests.text: Demon bats are the bane of my existence. Every blue moon one of those bastards make it out of their god forsaken hole and wreck havoc on plot. Do me a favor and help me locate where they come from.
quests.completion_text: Ew, that place sounds just as disgusting as I’d imagine. I’d suggest you take a bath to get some of that stench off you.

quests.title: Into the Darkness
quests.text: There is something I need to find in the Forgotten Castle. But first, the path must be cleared. Beasts and vermin tainted by darkness block the way, and my strength alone is not enough to handle them... Could you eliminate these creatures for me?
quests.completion_text: Thank you. Traveling through the area has become much easier—at least for now. I hope to find what I’m looking for before those creatures swarm back again... Ah, it’s a book. According to the Alchemist, these books could aid his research. Wish me luck.

quests.title: Fortune's Guidance
quests.text: Glad to see you made it back in one piece. The search for the Leathersmith’s daughter has turned up nothing, but I’ve been digging around... got desperate enough to visit that damn fortune teller. She gave me a place to check—let's see if there's any truth to her cryptic ramblings.
quests.completion_text: Well, I’ll be damned. She was right... I don’t know how, but it seems we’re on the right path. It’s a sliver of hope, but it’s enough for now. And between you and me, that fortune teller lady freaks me out—she eats bloody eyeballs and all sorts of strange things.

quests.title: The Use of a Forgotten Castle
quests.text: The cursed castle is full of terrible things, but it sits in a forest long left untouched where good timber can still be found. Sometimes I go there to cut wood and salvage usable pieces from broken remains. If you go to the castle and find good timber, could you bring some back for me?
quests.completion_text: You found some good usable pieces. Wood is heavy, so it is hard for me to carry much on my own. Thanks to you, my work will be much easier. Thank you.

quests.title: A Dire Request
quests.text: Please investigate the bridges of the Forgotten Castle and the site where the ritual, tainted by darkness, was once performed. I've heard rumors that if one lingers there for too long, the screams of someone unseen can be heard. I need to know whether this is truth or mere superstition.
quests.completion_text: You truly heard nothing? Truly...? That can't be... Another lead, ending in nothing... Sometimes, it feels suffocating, unbearable. When I think of her, suffering even at this very moment... Haa... Haa... No, this won’t do. I need to rest. Please, leave me be for now.

quests.title: The Basics
quests.text: People think it’s the beasts that get you in this land, but it’s not. It’s the cold. The hunger. It gets into your skin, your bones, and slowly, you’re dead before you even know it. I’ve seen too many inexperienced fools wander into the wilderness, too proud to listen to warnings, and they end up like the others. No one dies in their sleep out here unless they’re already dead. If you’re not careful, hunger and frost will do their work long before the claws of any creature ever get the chance. So it’s important to always cover your basics before any adventure.
quests.completion_text: Those supplies you gathered will keep us from being another casualty of the cold. I know this lesson all too well. There was a time, not long ago, when I lost some of my closest companions to the freezing winter. I wanted to bury them, to give them the peace they deserved, but the earth was locked in ice, cold as death itself. When I finally returned to bury them properly, their bodies had vanished.

quests.title: Ancient Records
quests.text: I searched through every bookshelf in the Ruins, but with my dull senses, I couldn’t find a single thing. This isn’t good... I was promised something in exchange for retrieving those books for the Alchemist, something I must obtain. Could you search for the books in my stead? Please, I’m counting on you.
quests.completion_text: Thank you so much. I won’t forget your help. Now, I just need to bring this to the Alchemist, and I’ll receive a new potion. The effects? ...I’ll tell you about them later.
